commands.summary: Local system audit passed after marking CLV-014 satisfied: required files, work item manifests, stale README checks, and Markdown link/date checks are current.
Repository governance validation passed with the new decision record and CLV-014 evidence.
RepoPact dashboard regenerated after CLV-014 evidence and decision updates.

environment.process_note: 015 CLV-014 (Twilio Verify scope). Twilio Verify is deferred as a future provider-neutral capability, not shipped in the current runtime/UI. A future verification signal may not create contacts, unblock contacts, allow approvals, allow urgent interrupts, or raise trust level without an explicit operator contact-policy decision.
